title: Rich Filipino Guanciale Pancit Canton
description: A jammy and crumbly Filipino dish featuring guanciale and beurre-monte, this pancit canton is a crowd-pleaser that is also diabetic-friendly.

ingredients.name: guanciale
ingredients.notes: cured and air-dried Italian pork jowl

instructions: Cook the pancit canton noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Cut the guanciale into small pieces and cook in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the guanciale from the pan and set aside, leaving the grease behind.
Add the vegetable oil to the pan and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the julienned carrots and shredded cabbage to the pan and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Add the beurre-monte to the pan and stir to combine, creating a creamy sauce.
Add the cooked guanciale back into the pan and stir to combine.
Season the dish with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pancit canton hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
